gyms.name: Redline Athletica
gyms.headline: Intervals, strength, and community that actually shows up.
gyms.summary: A high-accountability training floor built for members who want intensity without ego and structure without dead time.
gyms.about: Redline Athletica blends threshold intervals, strength blocks, and recovery coaching into one connected member journey. NDYRA powers the gym's public signals, event loop, member social layer, and token-aware timer experiences.
focus: Open gym templates that still feel guided

membership_options.label: Drop-in
membership_options.details: One coached class or open-gym session.

membership_options.label: Monthly access
membership_options.details: Best for members who want events, challenges, and ongoing recaps inside NDYRA.

membership_options.label: Token-friendly add-ons
membership_options.details: Timer packs, specialty programs, and event unlocks can ride the same NDYRA wallet.

class_highlights.name: Race Pace Reset
class_highlights.details: Threshold intervals, loaded carries, and a calm mobility finish.

class_highlights.name: Engine Room
class_highlights.details: Strength-first conditioning with guided effort targets.

class_highlights.name: Saturday Crew
class_highlights.details: Longer mixed-modality block with community recap shareouts.

upcoming_events.title: Community Run + Breathwork
upcoming_events.summary: Easy effort group run followed by guided down-regulation and recovery notes.

upcoming_events.title: Spring Consistency League
upcoming_events.summary: 30-day challenge season with streak shield support and shareable recaps.

public_signals.content_text: Open gym tonight. Keep it crisp, keep it kind.
Saturday race sim starts at 9. Bring water, bring patience.

gyms.name: Atlas Social Club
gyms.headline: Strength, socials, and a members directory that feels alive.
gyms.summary: A premium small-group strength club where the social graph, announcements, events, and recovery routines stay connected inside NDYRA.
gyms.about: Atlas Social Club uses NDYRA to keep class context, social follow loops, event RSVPs, and post-session recaps moving together. Public surfaces stay clean while member surfaces deepen once you sign in.

membership_options.label: Visitor weekend pass
membership_options.details: Best for event weekends or trial visits.

membership_options.label: Core member access
membership_options.details: Ongoing strength access plus challenge and event visibility in-app.

membership_options.label: Program add-ons
membership_options.details: Use NDYRA tokens for specialty blocks and timer-driven packs.

class_highlights.name: Foundations Lift
class_highlights.details: Tempo strength, coached setup, and recap-ready effort notes.

class_highlights.name: Atlas After Dark
class_highlights.details: Strength + social hour with event posting and follow-friendly recaps.

class_highlights.name: Restore Circuit
class_highlights.details: Mobility, easy cardio, and nervous-system reset work.

upcoming_events.title: Member Mixer + Coach Q&A
upcoming_events.summary: An evening social with structured intros for new members.

upcoming_events.summary: In-gym benchmark week with recap cards and challenge tie-ins.
